login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to your Logistics ERP workspace
login.invalidCredentials: The email or password you entered is incorrect.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor verification
twoFactor.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a recovery code.
twoFactor.invalidCode: That code is incorrect or has expired.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter and confirm your new password below.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset. Please log in.
resetPassword.genericError: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
